title: plan-state-machine per-state metrics record
description: One JSONL record emitted per state-transition.js --complete invocation, written to data/training/metrics-aggregate.jsonl and a per-state metrics file. A leaner diagnostic sidecar to the 12-point training record — captures cost and quality dimensions (context/token burn, guard retries, audit pass-rate, amendment volume, wall-clock). Distinct file from the training aggregate.jsonl; joined by plan+slug. See docs/experiments/plan-state-machine-metrics-extraction-spec.md.

schema_version.description: Literal 1. Incremented only on a breaking change (field removed or renamed); additive fields do not bump it.

kind.description: From dag.json nodes[slug].kind; null if absent.

phase.description: From dag.json nodes[slug].phase; null if absent.

executor.description: SOX_AGENT_NAME env var preferred; falls back to git config user.name; null if neither.

degraded.description: true when any field is unavailable (see spec §1.3); the record is still written and still flows to the sink.

wall_clock_s.description: done_at - started_at in whole seconds; null if either timestamp is missing or unparseable.

method.description: Which measurement approach was used (see spec §2).

context_file_bytes.description: UTF-8 byte length of contexts/<slug>.md at start_ref (or current content in retrospective mode).

shared_md_bytes.description: UTF-8 byte length of contexts/_shared.md at start_ref.

total_input_bytes.description: Sum of context_file + shared_md + any injected read_only blocks; proxy for context window consumed.

tool_call_count.description: From agent-mcp session usage telemetry; null if not available.

input_tokens_reported.description: From agent-mcp usage telemetry or orchestrator-reported flags; null means not instrumented, NOT zero.

output_tokens_reported.description: Same source as input_tokens_reported; null if not available.

measurement_note.description: Free text; required when method is null or transcript_byte_proxy.

gap_check_iterations.description: Gap-check run count during authoring. Only trustworthy if the authoring fix-loop is instrumented; null until then.

gap_check_failure_count.description: Total gap-check failures across iterations. Same instrumentation dependency; null until then.

fix_loop_present.description: true if amendment_log has an add-criterion or fix-guard entry attributable to authoring-phase correction.

retry_count.description: Times --complete exited 1 (guard failed) before the first exit 0. From the per-slug scratch counter; null in retrospective mode.

final_exit_code.description: Always 0 in a written record (exit 1 means --complete did not complete).

pass_rate.description: criteria_passed / criteria_total; null when no audit script ran (1.0 would be misleading) — degraded is then set.

audit_exit_code.description: 0 = all pass; 4 = some fail; 1 = script error; null if no audit ran.

total.description: Total amendment_log entries for this slug.

env_label.description: From PLAN_ENV_LABEL env var or plan-level config; null if absent.

env_pinned.description: true when env_label is set AND/OR the guard uses pinned tool resolution (see spec §3.2 heuristic).

start_ref.description: Full git SHA captured by --start; null in retrospective mode.

end_ref.description: Full git SHA captured at guard-pass time; null in retrospective mode.
